items.title: AWS DVA-C02 Exam Overview
items.description: Complete overview of the AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02) exam. Covers exam domains, scoring, study strategy, and all topic areas with links to detailed study pages.

items.title: Banking Domain Knowledge Base
items.description: Overview of Banking Domain Knowledge Base.

items.title: Database Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive reference covering relational fundamentals, indexing, transactions, distributed systems, caching, and more — with common interview questions.

items.title: Docker & Kubernetes Knowledge Base
items.description: A complete beginner-to-advanced guide to Docker and Kubernetes — from writing your first Dockerfile to running production-grade microservices on a managed Kubernetes cluster.

items.title: Java Knowledge Base Overview
items.description: A comprehensive reference covering Java fundamentals, collections, concurrency, JVM internals, modern language features, and interview preparation.

items.title: Networking Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive reference covering OSI/TCP-IP models, TCP/UDP, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, CDN, security, sockets, REST, gRPC, WebSockets, QUIC, and more — with interview questions.

items.title: Security Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive security reference for software engineers covering authentication, authorization, cryptography, web vulnerabilities, privacy, compliance, secure SDLC, and incident response.

items.title: Spring Knowledge Base Overview
items.description: A comprehensive reference covering Spring Boot, Spring Framework, security, data access, web layer architecture, and interview preparation.

items.title: System Design Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive knowledge base for system design patterns, architectural principles, scalability strategies, and interview preparation for software engineers.
